title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF EMERALD VALLEY HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 1545 W 22nd Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: School year hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6:30pm, non school day hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (541) 345-9939 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 345-9939 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $40 monthly fee, $40 membership fee (non-refundable) DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Eugene SITE HOURS: Summer Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm School Hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6:30pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Team Sports/Leagues Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
